items.title: First known congressional SpaceX stock buys surface after record IPO
items.summary: The SpaceX stock purchases come as Elon Musk’s company deepens its role in federal contracting and remains closely tied to President Donald Trump’s Washington.

items.title: 5 takeaways from President Donald Trump's interview with CNBC
items.summary: The president defended his family's business and said he feels bad that the presidency creates a conflict of interest in any of his children's investments.

items.title: Feds seek lower prison term for $100M New Jersey deli fraudster — but some reasons why are hidden
items.summary: James Patten is the third person who will be sentenced in the stock manipulation scheme related to Hometown International, a company that owned just one deli.

items.title: The hunt for AI's next winners defined the stock market's holiday-shortened week
items.summary: Wall Street kicked off the third quarter with mixed results after a blockbuster first half for stocks.

items.title: U.S. job creation cools in June with payrolls growth of just 57,000; unemployment rate at 4.2%
items.summary: Nonfarm payrolls were expected to rise by 115,000 in June and the unemployment rate to hold steady at 4.3%.

items.title: North Sea oil and renewables: The UK’s next PM faces a defining energy policy decision
items.summary: Andy Burnham could face an early test over North Sea oil drilling as energy shocks revive the UK energy security debate.

items.title: Don't throw away your shot to speak to an AI Alexander Hamilton at Boston's new finance museum
items.summary: Nearly a decade after leaving its former home, the Museum of American Finance is opening its new doors to the public.

items.title: SpaceX may emerge as ultimate blueprint for new wave of mega-cap IPOs
items.summary: "It would not surprise me at all to see a similar dynamic play out with some of these [IPOs] set to come in the months ahead," the Kathmere Capital CIO says.

items.title: Xi touts China Communist Party's global influence in speech marking 105th anniversary
items.summary: Chinese President Xi Jinping spoke Wednesday to commemorate the 105th anniversary of the ruling Communist Party of China.

items.title: China-linked actors target more than technology as AI competition with U.S. intensifies
items.summary: Cyberattacks from China-based entities are on the rise and not just targeting specific tech, analysts warn, as the U.S. AI race intensifies.

items.title: Giá vàng nhẫn trơn, vàng miếng chiều 3/7 tăng hơn 3 triệu đồng/lượng
items.summary: Giá vàng trong nước tăng mạnh trong phiên 3/7 khi các doanh nghiệp đồng loạt tăng giá từ 3 - 3,3 triệu đồng/lượng so với cuối phiên trước, đưa giá vàng miếng vượt mốc 151 triệu đồng/lượng. Đà tăng diễn ra trong bối cảnh giá vàng thế giới tiếp tục phục hồi nhờ kỳ vọng Fed sẽ bớt cứng rắn hơn sau loạt dữ liệu kinh tế Mỹ kém khả quan.

items.title: The browser wars aren’t about search anymore — here are the best alternatives to Chrome and Safari
items.summary: We’ve compiled an overview of some of the top alternative browsers available today aiming to challenge Chrome and Safari.

items.title: The Dune keypad device can be your meeting controller and more
items.summary: The gadget has three buttons, and it changes context based on what app you are looking at. For instance, in meeting apps and sites, it could be toggle mic, toggle video, and bring window to the front.

items.title: Chevy built an all-American EV truck — why is nobody buying it?

items.title: Rivian raises 2026 delivery outlook while Lucid misses Wall Street expectations for second quarter

items.title: OpenAI floats giving Trump administration 5 percent cut of AI boom
items.summary: OpenAI has floated giving the US government a 5 percent ownership stake as a way of easing tensions with the Trump administration and blunting mounting public backlash against AI, according to the Financial Times. CEO Sam Altman argued that giving the public a financial interest in the company would be the best way to share […]

items.title: Anthropic’s long-sidelined Fable 5 is greenlit to return
items.summary: After weeks of negotiating with the Trump administration, Anthropic is finally going to be able to bring Claude Fable 5 back online. In a post on X, Anthropic said it plans to begin restoring access Wednesday to users globally on Claude platforms, and that the company would re-enable access on AWS, Google Cloud, and Microsoft […]

items.title: Yep, we’re using OpenClaw to date now
items.summary: Ben Guez has "a bunch of potential international wives in [his] DMs," thanks to an automated script he set up using OpenClaw, Claude code, and Instagram trials.
